title: anthurium × ortgiesii
intro: Anthurium × ortgiesii, also known as the queen of the night, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family, characterized by its long-lasting, heart-shaped blooms in shades of pink to white. The plant's flowers contain anthraquinones, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Anthurium × ortgiesii have been associated with several health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and antioxidant activity. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, extracts, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its health-promoting properties.
